snippet.title: BLACKPINK - ‘GO’ M/V
snippet.description:
BLACKPINK - GO

I’m on a mission
I’m in control
I want your body
I want your soul

Here to the rescue
I’m number one
Your guardian angel
Your kingdom come

March to the beat of
Beat of my drum
‘Cause when I call you 
You’re gonna come

Hold in position
It’s gonna blow
You only move when
When I say so

GO
Blackpink’ll make ya
GO
Blackpink’ll make ya
 
Go get it, Imma go get it
Never gonna settle for second
I need a gold medal
Get up on the floor, tell me when to go, 
no slow jams
Bumpin through the speakers when I do my
go go dance
 
Oh no, 
I go when I wanna I go, I'm so gone 
Go reckless, go off, like what could go wrong 
I'm goin all in, you should know that's my go-to
My whole crew with me, if I go then they go too

March to the beat of
Beat of my drum‘Cause when I call you 
You’re gonna come

Hold in position
It’s gonna blow
You only move when
When I say so

GO
Blackpink’ll make ya
GO
Blackpink’ll make ya

When your heart is broken baby
Darkness on the edge of town
Try to keep it open baby
Try to let your walls come down
 
I know you’re frozen baby
Love can make you turn to stone
You could stop and be alone
 
Or you could 

GO
Blackpink’ll make ya
GO

I’m on a mission
Mission misson mission 

Available @ http://orcd.co/blackpink-deadline

More about BLACKPINK @
http://www.facebook.com/BLACKPINKOFFICIAL
http://www.youtube.com/BLACKPINKOFFICIAL
https://www.instagram.com/BLACKPINKOFFICIAL

snippet.title: Toxic Official Hindi Teaser | Rocking Star Yash | Geetu Mohandas | KVN | Monster Mind Creations
snippet.description:
It’s Gonna Get Crazyyyy !!!

Toxic - A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups in cinemas worldwide on 19-03-2026 in Kannada, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and English

#ToxicTheMovie #Toxic #ToxicTeaser
#DaddyIsHome #ToxicTheMovie 

CAST: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria and Rukmini Vasanth
 
CREW:
Director of Photography: Rajeev Ravi
Music: Ravi Basrur
Production Designer: T. P. Abid
Editor: Ujwal Kulkarni
Sound Designer: Kunal Sharma
Associate Producers: Sandeep Sadashiva, Prashant Dileep Hardikar
Action Directors: J. J. Perry, Anbariv, Kecha Khamphakdee, Amrit Singh
Art Director (Bengaluru): Mohan B. Kere
Art Director: Sandeep G. Sharma
Executive Producer: M. K. Subramanya
Kannada Dialogues: Raaghav Vinay
Directors of Choreography: Ganesh Acharya, Imran Sardhariya, A. Harsha
First Assistant Director: Rao Suhaib Khan
Script Supervisor: Doyel Hargunaney
Line Producer: Akshay Mavle
Costume Designers: Neha R. Bajaj, Saniya Sardhariya (Yash)
Hair Designer: Darshan Yewalekar
Make-up & Prosthetics: Shipra Singh Acharya
Post Production: The Post Co.
Re-recording Mixer: Sreejesh Nair
Music Producer: Ravi Basrur, Chethan Handattu, Pavan Basrur, Jagadish Venky
RBM Composing Team: Santhosh Venky, Airaa Udupi, Rohit Siddappa 
Trumpet Live: Manju Bajanthri Devara Hosapete & Team
RBM Studio Coordinators:
Shivakumar, Nagaprakash Kota, Prakash Kumar, Krishna Basrur, Vijay Basrur
DI Colorist: Jayadev Tiruveaipati
DI: Redefine
VFX: DNEG
Publicity Design: Kabilan Chelliah
Visual Promotion: Ruben Trailer House

Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions and Monster Mind Creations

snippet.description:

 IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH NEELABH TIWARI FILMS (OPC) Pvt Ltd. 

फ़िल्म - जेठानी की अरेंज  मैरेज देवरानी की लव मैरेज
कलाकार - स्मृति  सिन्हा  , डिम्पल  सिंह  , अथवा  नाहर  , लाडो  मधेसिया  अनूप  अरोरा  , संतोष  श्रीवास्तव  , सृष्टि पाठक  , श्रद्धा  नवल  , निशा  तिवारी
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
निर्देशक – प्रवीण कुमार गुदुरु  
लेखक - प्राणनाथ
संगीतकार- ओम  झा  
संकलन - धरम सोनी
छायांकन- माही शेरर्ला
कोरियोग्राफर - कानू मुख़र्जी , सोनू प्रीतम
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - बॉलीवुड उमंग
पार्शव संगीत वो मिक्सिंग - प्रियांशू राज
आर्ट डायरेक्टर - अंजनी तिवारी
सह निर्देशक - सुवेश सिंह अभिजीत श्रीवास्तव
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, नीलाभ तिवारी
 म्यूजिक- IVY ENT
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया झा
IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस  
प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे, हिमांशु चौधरी

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

snippet.description:
Presenting the 8K Full Video Holi Song "Balam Pichkari" from the film "Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani". Starring Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur & Kalki Koechlin.

Credits:
Song: Balam Pichkari
Music: Pritam Chakraborty
Singer: Vishal Dadlani, Shalmali Kholgade 
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Movie: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani (2013)
Director: Ayan Mukerji
Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Kalki Koechlin
Music Label: T-Series

Lyrics:
Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi
Mere ang raja, jo tera rang laga
Toh seedhi-saadi chhori sharabi ho gayi

Itna maza, kyun aa raha hai
Tune hawa mein bhaang milaya

Itna maza, kyun aa raha hai
Tune hawa mein bhaang milaya
Dugna nasha, kyun ho raha hai
Aankhon se meetha tune khilaya

Ho teri malmal ki kurti gulabi ho gayi
Manchali chaal kaise nawaabi ho gayi, toh?

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Teri kalaai hai, haathon mein aayi hai
Maine maroda toh lagti malaai hai

Mehenga padega ye chaska malaai ka
Upvaas karne mein teri bhalaai hai

Ho bindiya teri mehtaabi ho gayi
Dil ke armaanon mein behisaabi ho gayi

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Kyun ‘no-vacancy’ ki, hothon pe gaali hai
Jabki tere dil ka kamra toh khaali hai
(kamra toh khaali hai…)

Mujhko pata hai re
Kya chahata hai tu
Boli bhajan teri
Neeyat Qawwali hai

Zulmi ye haazir-jawaabi ho gayi
Tu toh har taale ki aaj chaabi ho gayi, toh?

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa, Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Haan, bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi

en-US.title: Balam Pichkari 8K Full Video | Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani | Pritam | Ranbir,Deepika |Non Stop Holi Song
en-US.description:
Presenting the 8K Full Video Holi Song "Balam Pichkari" from the film "Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani". Starring Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur & Kalki Koechlin.

Credits:
Song: Balam Pichkari
Music: Pritam Chakraborty
Singer: Vishal Dadlani, Shalmali Kholgade
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Movie: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani (2013)
Director: Ayan Mukerji
Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Kalki Koechlin
Music Label: T-Series

Lyrics:
The Balam Pichkari tune that killed me
You said the world has become barren
My king, when your color touched me
The simple and simple girl has become drunk

Why are you having so much fun?
Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

Why are you having so much fun?
Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

Why are you getting double the intoxication? Yes,
I played a sweet tune with my eyes.

Yes, your muslin kurti has turned pink.

How did your playful gait become royal, then?

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.
The simple, simple girl became a drunkard.
Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.
The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Your wrist is in my hands.
I mean, it feels like a mala.

This addiction to mala will be expensive.
It's your goodness to abstain.

Your bindi has become your beauty.
It has become immeasurable in the desires of my heart.

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.
The simple, simple girl became a drunkard.
Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.
The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law. (x2)

Why are you cursing about 'no vacancy'?
When the room in your heart is empty.
(The room is empty...)

I know what you want.
You said your prayers.
Your intention is Qawwali.

O cruel one, you've become quick to reply.
You've become the key to every lock today, right?

The tune of "Balam Pichkari" killed me.
The simple, sari-clad girl became a drunkard.
Yes, the tune that struck me while I was wearing jeans,
Then I became the neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Yes, I said, the world has become barren.
Yes, I said, the world has become barren...

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] รักครูเท่าโลกเลย Love you teacher #LoveYouTeacherSeries
snippet.description:
ชีวิตอันเงียบสงบของ “ครูพบเมฆ” (เพิร์ธ ธนพนธ์) ครูประถมหน้าดุ ผู้ไม่ถูกชะตากับเด็ก กำลังจะพังทลาย เมื่อ “ครูโซลาร์” (แซนต้า พงศภัค) แฟนหนุ่มผู้สดใส ประสบอุบัติเหตุจนสมองรีเซ็ต กลับไปเป็นเด็กเจ็ดขวบในร่างผู้ใหญ่แบบวันเว้นวัน! สถานการณ์ยิ่งชวนปั่นป่วน เมื่อ “ครูจี้” (เค เลิศสิทธิชัย) ครูประถมคนใหม่ เพื่อนเก่าในวัยเด็กของพบเมฆ ปรากฏตัวขึ้นในฐานะครูไฟแรงครบเครื่อง มาคอยเปรียบเทียบให้ชีวิตครูพบเมฆดูแย่ จน “ครูสดชื่น” (แซมมี่ ซาแมนท่า) รักษาการผู้อำนวยการโรงเรียน อดเป็นห่วงไม่ได้ว่า ทั้งชีวิตครูและความรักของครูพบเมฆจะยังไปรอดหรือไม่ ความรักครั้งนี้จะพังไม่เป็นท่า หรือจะกลายเป็นบทเรียนที่แสนอบอุ่นที่สุดในชีวิตของครูคนหนึ่งกัน! 

          มาเอาใจช่วยพวกเขากันได้ใน “รักครูเท่าโลกเลย LOVE YOU TEACHER” ทุกวันเสาร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ดูทีวี ช่อง GMM25 | ดูย้อนหลัง แอป oneD ที่เดียว เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 14 มีนาคมนี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : จารุพัฒน์ กันนุลา

รายชื่อนักแสดง
เพิร์ธ ธนพนธ์ สุขุมพันธนาสาร รับบท พบเมฆ
แซนต้า พงศภัค อุดมโภชน์ รับบท โซลาร์
แซมมี่ ซาแมนท่า เมลานี่ โค้ทส์     รับบท  สดชื่น
เค เลิศสิทธิชัย                               รับบท  จี้

snippet.title: Subedaar - Official Trailer | Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh, Saurabh Shukla
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Trailer 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#subedaar #SubedaarOnPrime #anilkapoor #trailer #officialtrailer #movie #primevideoindia

snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by Pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey we’ll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek ✖️ Swar — two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

ClassX RUSH Live – Final EP
Vek ✖️ Swar  one stage, one moment, one memory.

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

km.title: ១៣ នាទីមុននេះ កប៉ាល់ដឹកទំនិញរបស់សហរដ្ឋអាមេរិកចំនួន ២ គ្រឿងដែលផ្ទុកប្រេងឥន្ធនៈចំនួន ១២,០០០ តោនត្រូវបា
km.description:
១៣ នាទីមុននេះ កប៉ាល់ដឹកទំនិញរបស់សហរដ្ឋអាមេរិកចំនួន ២ គ្រឿងដែលផ្ទុកប្រេងឥន្ធនៈចំនួន ១២,០០០ តោនត្រូវបានបំផ្លាញដោយនាវា Yak-141 របស់រុស្ស៊ី។ 



#អាម៉ា ៣ 
#មីស៊ីម 
# ការលេងហ្គេម 
#អ៊ុយក្រែន រុស្ស៊ី 
# រុស្ស៊ី 
#អ៊ុយក្រែន 
#ណាតូ 
# BayRaktar 
# អ្នកក្លែងធ្វើយោធា 
# ប្រតិបត្តិករវរជន 
វីដេអូនេះគឺជាការក្លែងធ្វើហ្គេមនិម្មិត។ 
ការក្លែងធ្វើប្រយុទ្ធអាចខុសគ្នាពីការក្លែងធ្វើជាក់ស្តែង។ 
យើងក្លែងធ្វើអត្ថបទដែលបង្ហាញក្នុងព័ត៌មាន។ 
វីដេអូលេងហ្គេម ARMA ។ 

"វីដេអូនេះត្រូវបានផលិតដោយប្រើខ្លឹមសារពី Bohemia Interactive a.s"

13 মিনিট আগে, 12,000 টন জ্বালানি বহনকারী 2টি মার্কিন কার্গো জাহাজ রাশিয়ান ইয়াক-141 দ্বারা ধ্বংস হয়েছিল। 



#আরমা ৩ 
#মিলসিম 
#গেমপ্লে

# অভিজাত অপারেটর 
এই ভিডিওটি একটি ভার্চুয়াল গেম সিমুলেশন। 
যুদ্ধের সিমুলেশন প্রকৃত সিমুলেশন থেকে ভিন্ন হতে পারে। 
আমরা সংবাদে প্রদর্শিত নিবন্ধগুলি অনুকরণ করেছি। 
আরমা গেমপ্লে ভিডিও। 

"এই ভিডিওটি বোহেমিয়া ইন্টারেক্টিভ a.s এর সামগ্রী ব্যবহার করে তৈরি করা হয়েছে।"

#মিলসিম

এই ভিডিওটি একটি ভার্চুয়াল গেম সিমুলেশন। 
যুদ্ধের সিমুলেশন প্রকৃত সিমুলেশন থেকে ভিন্ন হতে পারে।

te.description:
13 నిమిషాల క్రితం, 12,000 టన్నుల ఇంధనాన్ని తీసుకువెళుతున్న 2 US కార్గో షిప్‌లను రష్యన్ యాక్-141లు ధ్వంసం చేశాయి. 



#ఆర్మా 3 
#మిల్సిమ్ 
#గేమ్ ప్లే 
#Ukraineevs రష్యా 
#రష్యా 
#ఉక్రెయిన్ 
#NATO 
#BayRaktar 
#మిలిటరీ సిమ్యులేటర్ 
#ఎలైట్ ఆపరేటర్ 
ఈ వీడియో వర్చువల్ గేమ్ సిమ్యులేషన్. 
పోరాట అనుకరణ వాస్తవ అనుకరణకు భిన్నంగా ఉండవచ్చు.

ਲੜਾਈ ਦਾ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਅਸਲ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਖਰਾ ਹੋ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ। 
ਅਸੀਂ ਖਬਰਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਦਿਖਾਈ ਦੇਣ ਵਾਲੇ ਲੇਖਾਂ ਦੀ ਨਕਲ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਾਂ। 
ਆਰਮਾ ਗੇਮਪਲੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ।

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Neele phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terе liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye…

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

Tags ~

Khat Song

Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Lyrics for "Sia - Cheap Thrills"

[Intro: Sean Paul]
Up with it girl
Rock with it girl
Show dem it girl (Bada bang bang)
Bounce with it girl
Dance with it girl
Get with it girl (Bada bang bang)

[Verse 1: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Friday night and I won't be long
Gotta do my hair, I put my make up on
It's Friday night and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 2: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Saturday and I won't be long
Gotta paint my nails, put my high heels on
It's Saturday and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need (Sia)
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 3: Sean Paul & (Sia)]
Me an you, girl, you an me
Drop it to di floor an mek mi see your energy because
Mi nah play nuh hide an seek
Wah fi see di ting you have weg mek me feel weak girl (Free)
'Cause anytime you wine an kotch it
Di selector pull it up an put it pon repeat, girl
I'm nah touch a dollar in mi pocket
'Cause nuttn' in this world ain't more dan what you worth (I love cheap thrills!)

[Bridge: Sia & Sean Paul]
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control
Oh, oh

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Outro: Sia]
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)

snippet.title: Aaya Sher - Lyrical | The Paradise | Nani | Anirudh Ravichander | Srikanth Odela
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Telugu

Presenting the first single "Aaya Sher" from 'The Paradise' starring Nani and others. Directed by Srikanth Odela. Music Composed by Anirudh Ravichander. 

Music Credits:
Aaya Sher
Album / Movie : The Paradise 
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Kasarla Shyam 
Vocals - Addula Jangireddy, Arjun Chandy

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboards, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Trumpet & Flugelhorn - Rakesh MS
Chorus Arranged & Sung by Arjun Chandy
Backing Vocals - Akunoori Devaihah, Yogi Sekar, Sridhar Sena
Rhythm Produced by Kalyan
Additional Rhythm Programmed by Karthik Vamsi, Shashank Vijay
Orchestrals Programmed by IC, Dan Kriston
Additional Music Programmed By Arish
Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya
Session Assistant - Shivakiran

Recorded at
Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai
Mastered by Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B


Movie Credits:
Cast: Natural Star Nani, Sonali Kulkarni & Others.
Technical Crew:
Writer - Director: Srikanth Odela
Producer: Sudhakar Cherukuri
Banner: Slv Cinemas
Music Director: Anirudh
Dop: Ch Sai
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Chief Co-Director & Additional Screenplay: Vinay Sagar Jonnala
Co-Director: Hari K Chanduri
Writers: Thota Srinivas, Madhava Murthy Bojanapu, Arjuna Paturi, Vamshi Krishna Pinnika, Vasanth Masadi, Manupati Karunakar (Karna)
Dialect & Diction: Krishna Teja 
Costume Designer: Ajay Kumar J
Sound Designer: Suren G
Publicity Designer: Kabilan Chelliah
Vfx Supervisor: Naresh Yalla
Titles: Hari Krishna Y
Direction Team: Gajjala Bhaskar Reddy , Nagaraju Bramhaiha , Yashwanth Vittapu ,Madhu Sugreevu, Billakurthi, Venkata Aarush , Bhaskar Ponaboina , Uday Swaroop Kalahasti , Sai Kiran Modem , Hosakota Vamshi Krishna , Jasti Guhan Chowdary , Chaitthu Mothkuri .
Color By: Redchillies.Color
Sr. Colorist: Ken Metzker
Stills: Sridhar Chadalawada
Pro: Vamsi-Sekhar
Marketing: First Show
Co Producer : Gopi Chand Innamuri  
Ceo : Vijay Kumar Chaganti 
Executive Producer: Abinav Waddypally
Production Controller: Jetty Vinay
Production Team: Kalyan Kumar Sagiraju, Brahmam Chigurupati, 
Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu
2nd Unit Cinematographer - Praveen Pothan
Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentine’s Special Love Song
snippet.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker

en.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
en.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show — just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

We’ll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy Valentine’s Day ;)

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

hi.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP
snippet.description:
After becoming the first King of the Unstable SMP, I promised to protect my people and my kingdom... and if I don't? Then I'll resign. These are my First 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP.  

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪ @wemmbumc 
➜ ‪  ‪ @FlameFragsMC 
➜ ‪   @Spokeishere 
➜ ‪  ‪ @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @dragon_mc_ @lezywezy @4CVIT @LettuceK 

Original Song by @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | QUARTER FINALS | Day 4
snippet.description:
The Quarter Finals of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens as qualified teams step into a stage where every match carries heavier consequences. Consistency, composure, and calculated aggression will define who moves forward.

From The Grind to Round 4, the journey has built up to this moment. Now the margin for error gets thinner.

Watch the Quarter Finals unfold and see who takes the next step toward the Finals.

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #KraftonIndiaEsports #KIE #BGMI

snippet.title: ROBLOX WOULD YOU RATHER, But It ACTUALLY HAPPENS..
snippet.description:
Today i played roblox would you rather but it actually happens. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Maan Panu - The Last Letter (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
‘The Last Letter’ is about the words we never said, and the love that never really leaves. This is for anyone who has ever held on to that one last feeling… that one last memory… that one last letter.

STREAM NOW: https://va.lnk.to/thelastletter

Song Name: The Last Letter
Artist: Maan Panu
Lyrics: Maan Panu
Music Producer: Mazaak
Composed by: Maan Panu
Recording Engineer: Samir Dharap at Input One
Mixed & Mastered by: Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika

Video Credits:

Directed by: Tushar Ronak
DOP: Arjun Thaper

Art Intern: Ojasvi

Female Lead: Kanchan Tomar
New Boy: Dev Chopra

Lyrics:

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum shaam subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Tune na jaana tere jaane se kya kya hua
Kitni kahani bani kitna tamasha hua
Jaane tu kaisi hogi aur voh deewana tera
Khush tu bhi kya hi hogi aur kya salona jahan

Mera sara badan tha so raha
Bas aankh reh gayi thi
Aisa lag raha tha mar gaye
Bas saans reh gayi thi

Tum phool chura ke chal diye
Bas shaakh reh gayi thi
Tum shama bujha ke chal diye
Bas raakh reh gayi thi

Tum shaam subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Be hisaab reh gayi thi

Barsaat reh gayi thi

Ji Chanta Matina invites you to stop hiding your feelings and let your heart speak. We bring you a playful confession of love. 

Written/Produced/Mixed by Sushant KC
Produced by Uff KC
Mixed/Mastered by Foeseal

Cast
Samrakshya | Sushant KC

Directed by: Abhiyan Kala Magar | Rajiv Sherchan | Sushant KC
Director of Photography (DOP): Abhiyan Kala Magar
Drone Operator: Sagar B.K.
Makeup & Hair: Riya Konaju | Reeya Ghising | Silpa Neupane
Assistant Team: Shrijan Shrestha | Sagar B.K.
Camera Assistant: Aman Shahi Thakuri
Production Team: Kapil Sim | Bishal Mahat
Camera & Lighting Support: Kushal Khadka | Shaney Ghale | Sailesh Gurung
Art & Styling: Nikki Shrestha
Behind The Scenes: S2 Productions
Post-Production: Thomas Magar
Logistics & Management: Gardens on Forest | Bishnu Sapkota | Laxman Sapkota

Special Appearances:

Hiroshi Khanal 
Avash bomjan (Abom/Minority report)
Janiva Shrestha 
Anu Pradhan 
Zoya Shakya 
Aria Shrestha 
Aarobi Shrestha

Special thanks to:
Anup Man, Samira, Baithak, Manju Kshetri, Mahesh Kiran Dangi, Aanjit Gurung, Anisha Shrestha,
Sandip Adhikari, Bipin, Hardik Bhattarai, Ozabhi, Samira,
Hrithik Lamichhane Gurung, Roshni Thapa, Cirzona Chhetri,
Krishna KC,  Sam Pradhan, Amrita Yadav, Bikal Shrestha,
Jeetesh Shakya, Sampan Baraili, Ram Shrestha, Ershad Ahmed,
Pasang Sherpa, Kushal KC, Ayush Singh Thakuri, Manik Karki

snippet.title: 2026 महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल - Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram - Lo-fi Version - कर्पूरगौरं करुणावतारं
snippet.description:
Experience the serene and soothing vibes of Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram in a calming lo-fi rendition by Pawan Brijwasi. This version beautifully blends the timeless devotion of the classic Sanskrit bhajan with mellow lo-fi beats, creating a perfect backdrop for meditation, relaxation, or introspective moments.

Subscribe us :- https://bit.ly/3EESq5h

Make Reels on Instagram :-
https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1470930621049591/

Available on :-

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All

The Romantic – the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Directed by Bruno Mars & Daniel Ramos

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
I’ll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldn’t climb
It's crazy but it’s true. There’s nothing I won't do. 
I’d risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
I’m trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh i’ll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heart’s on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ain’t a mountain you could point to I wouldn’t climb

It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do
I’d risk it all for you (2x)

Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Shop Bruno’s official store: https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore

Connect with Bruno: 
https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars
https://www.instagram.com/brunomars
https://www.youtube.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars
https://www.facebook.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #RiskItAll #OfficialMusicVideo

snippet.title: Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake | Broken Vibes | Heart Touching Qawwali Sad Song | Emotional Pain Song
snippet.description:
Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake ek dil ko chhoo lene wala emotional song hai, jo un logon ke liye hai jinka dard lafzon se zyada gehra hota hai.
Ye gaana un yaadon, un aansuon aur us khamoshi ko bayan karta hai jise koi samajh nahi paata.
Agar aap broken vibes, heart touching sad songs, aur deep emotional music pasand karte hain, to ye song aapke dil tak zaroor pahuchega 💔
🎧 Headphones lagakar sunein aur apne dard ko mehsoos karein…

👉 Apna dard comments me likho… shayad koi samajh le 🤍

snippet.title: मंदिर की सीढ़ी चढ़ चढ़ मांगो  Official Video Song 2026  Bhakti Special
snippet.description:
#TrendingBhajan #NewBhajan #Bhajan2026
मंदिर की सीढ़ी चढ़-चढ़ मांगो | Official Video Song 2026 | Bhakti Special

मंदिर की सीढ़ी चढ़-चढ़ मांगू 🙏  
यह भजन हर उस इंसान की कहानी है जो सच्चे दिल से भगवान के दर पर जाता है।

  Song : मंदिर की सीढ़ी चढ़-चढ़ मांगो
🎬 Video : Official  Video
🎤 Singer: Dev Kumar, Karina Sharma 
🎤 Language : Hindi 
✍️ Lekh: Dev Kumar 
🎶 Music: Beat Suno ,Roshan 
📺 Channel: beat Suno Naya 

इस भावुक भजन में आस्था, विश्वास और प्रार्थना की शक्ति दिखाई गई है।
अगर आप भक्ति गीत, दिल को छू जाने वाले भजन और
पुराने–नए devotional songs पसंद करते हैं,
तो यह भजन जरूर सुनें।
🙏 जय भोलेनाथ 🙏

snippet.title: ROBLOX SLIDE FOR BRAINROTS..
snippet.description:
Today I had to slide down a hill for the rarest brainrots. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Song: Namo Namo
Singer: Amit Trivedi
Lyricist: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Composed & Produced by Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios  Mumbai  - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar  
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed & Mastered by Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai 
Assisted by Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula
Musician Names:-
Programmed -  Amit Trivedi, Raja Rasaily & Krishna Kishor
Percussions - Krishna Kishor
Flute - Vishnu Vijay
Sitar - Kishor 
Mandolin & Strings - Seenu 
Backing Vocals - Rajiv Sundaresan & Suhas Sawant

RSVP & Guy In The Sky Pictures present Kedarnath Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput, Sara Ali Khan, Nitish Bharadwaj, Alka Amin, Sonali Sachdev, Pooja Gor, Nishant Dahiya

Directed by Abhishek Kapoor 
Produced by Ronnie Screwvala & Pragya Kapoor 
Co-Produced by Abhishek Kapoor & Abhishek Nayyar 
Story: Abhishek Kapoor & Kanika Dhillon 
Screenplay & Dialogue: Kanika Dhillon 
Music: Amit Trivedi 
DOP: Tushar Kanti Ray

Editor: Chandan Arora 
Background Score: Hitesh Sonik 
Sound Designer: Allwin Rego & Sanjay Maurya.

Lyrics:

Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya Bhalaa…
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke Chalaa…

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O O…)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O O…)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O O…)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O O…)

Kya Samay… Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
Mahaanta… Mahaanta…

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi Mera…

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi Tera…
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O O…)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O O…)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O O…)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O O…)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon Mein… Jataaon Mein…

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Maanga Kuch Kabhi Nahi
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tune Sirf Hai Diya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Samudra Manthan Ka Tha Samay Jo Aa Pada
Dwand Dono Lok Me Vish-Amrit Pe Tha Chhida
Amrit Sabhi Main Baant Ke
Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

snippet.title: 🤔aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye 😱 Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d
snippet.description:
🤔aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye 😱 Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d


What happens when the worlds of gaming, vlogging, and cartoons collide? In today’s action-packed episode of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, we are heading on a massive mission!
The Storyline:
We are traveling deep into the village to meet the legends themselves—Sourav Joshi, Piyush Joshi, and Kunal! But we aren't going empty-handed. To make this meeting unforgettable, we’ve secured a luxury Ferrari as a special gift!
The Squad:
It’s not just a solo trip! We’ve got the ultimate gang traveling together by train:
Chacha (The muscle)
Doraemon (With his gadgets ready)
Shinchan (Bringing the mischief)
Watch us navigate the tracks, manage the heavy cargo on the train, and drive through the village roads to deliver this supercar to the Joshi family. Will we reach safely, or will there be chaos on the way?
Buckle up for the most legendary delivery in simulator history!

The Mission: Delivering a Ferrari via train.
The Guests: Sourav Joshi, Piyush, and Kunal.
The Crew: Shinchan, Doraemon, and Chacha.
The Game: Indian Bikes Driving 3D (Indian Simulator).

⭐Halsey:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/halsey


Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Andrew Taggart]
Hey, I was doing just fine before I met you
I drink too much and that's an issue, but I'm okay
Hey, you tell your friends it was nice to meet them
But I hope I never see them again

[Pre-Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no calls
Now you're lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Verse 2: Halsey]
You look as good as the day I met you
I forget just why I left you, I was insane
Stay and play that blink-182 song
That we beat to death in Tucson, okay

[Pre-Chorus: Halsey, Halsey & Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no call
Now I'm lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Bridge: Andrew Taggart, Halsey, Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Halsey, Halsey & Andrew Taggart]
Older
We ain't ever gettin' older
Older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older

snippet.title: Arsenal vs Chelsea SQUAD BUILDER BATTLE — FC Mobile London Derby!
snippet.description:
The Takeover Showdown Series is HERE! Episode 1 — London Derby. Me vs @VishyFC. Arsenal vs Chelsea. We each get 15 billion coins to build a squad using only past or present club players who played for at least 2 seasons. No tradeables, no training — market bought players only. 3 guesses each to sabotage the other squad. 2 protected players each. Then we go Head to Head — home leg and away leg. 12 points available across OVR, aggregate, golden boot and clean sheets. All counting towards $1,000 across the full 6 episode series!

Points System:
⭐ 5 points — Highest OVR team
⚽ 3 points — Win the aggregate
🥇 2 points — Golden boot winner
🛡️ 1 point per clean sheet

🔔 Subscribe and help me reach 3M subscribers!

Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan

Album :- Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal 
Song :- Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal Keh Do Radha Rani Se
Singer :- Chetna
Lyrics :- Traditional
Music :- RRD
Lable :- Sunao Bhajan

radha krishna holi song,radha krishna bhajan,holi bhajan,vrindavan me ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan me ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan holi bhajan,vrindavan ki holi,holiya me ude re gulal bhajan,shyam holi geet,kanha ji holi bhajan,kanha ji holi song,radha krishna holi bhajan 2025,radha krishna holi bhajan,krishna songs,krishna bhajan,holi ke bhajan,holi bhajan krishna,bhajan 

वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
कह दो राधा रानी से हाँ कह दो राधा रानी से….

राधा हमारी भोली भाली,
हाँ भोली भाली भोली भाली,
नटखट नन्द का लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा हमारी गोरी गोरी,
गोरी गोरी राधा गोरी गोरी,
श्याम सलोने नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा के माथे पे बिंदिया सोहे,
बिंदिया सोहे हाँ बिंदिया सोहे,
मोर मुकुट नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा के हाथों में चुडिया सोहे,
चुडिया सोहे हाँ चुडिया सोहे,
बंसी बजावे नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

snippet.title: Djo - End Of Beginning (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿Listen: Djo - End Of Beginning (Lyrics)

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Just one more tear to cry, one teardrop from my eye
You better save it for
The middle of the night when things aren't black and white
Enter, Troubadour
"Remember twenty-four?"

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning

[Verse 2]
This song has started now, and you're just finding out
Now isn't that a laugh?
A major sacrifice, but clueless at the time
Enter, Caroline
"Just trust me, you'll be fine"

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning
(Goodbye, goodbye, goodbye, goodbye)

[Bridge]
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
Oh, I wave goodbye to the end of beginning
(Goodbye, goodbye)

snippet.title: Easily 3 Star Dragon Escape Challenges 1-4 (Clash of Clans)
snippet.description:
How to 3 Star Levels 1 to 4 of the Hero Campaign: Dragon Escape Challenges in Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth provides a tutorial for the new event attacks which celebrate the launch of the Dragon Duke Hero. The March Season is Dragon Themed for the Dragon Duke and comes with numerous events, including Free Equipment or Starry Ore on the Supercell Store. Thank you for using code judo to support the channel. Best of luck with your 3 stars!

Free Equipment or Starry Ore on Supercell Store: https://store.supercell.com/en?boost=judo 

Suggested Videos: 
Dragon Duke Explained - New Hero: https://youtu.be/SyHlEE8woTE
1 vs 10 Clan War to Double My Ore: https://youtu.be/aoidq7EOMXE

Thank you for using Code 'Judo' in Clash of Clans to support me.

es.title: Fácilmente 3 Estrellas en Desafíos Fuga Dracónica 1-4 (Clash of Clans)
es.description:
Cómo conseguir los niveles 1 a 4 de la Campaña de Heroica: Desafíos de Fuga Dracónica en Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth ofrece un tutorial para los nuevos ataques de evento que celebran el lanzamiento del Héroe Duque Dragón. La temporada de marzo está inspirada en los dragones del Duque Dragón e incluye numerosos eventos, como equipamiento gratis o mineral estelar en la Tienda Supercell. Gracias por usar el código judo para apoyar el canal. ¡Mucha suerte con tus 3 estrellas!

Equipamiento gratis o mineral estelar en la Tienda Supercell: https://store.supercell.com/en?boost=judo

Videos Sugeridos:
Explicación del Duque Dragón - Nuevo Héroe: https://youtu.be/SyHlEE8woTE
Guerra de Clanes 1 contra 10 para duplicar mi mineral: https://youtu.be/aoidq7EOMXE

snippet.title: Alex Warren - Ordinary (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👑 Alex Warren - Ordinary (Lyrics)
🎶 Listen on Spotify: http://bit.ly/4c1YIwO
🔥 Help us reach 100,000 subscribers!
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

🎧 Stream & Download: https://alexwarren.lnk.to/ordinary

https://www.instagram.com/alexwaarren/

📱 Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nearsidehq

×=×=×=×=×  

Lyrics for "Alex Warren - Ordinary"

[Verse 1]
They say, "The holy water's watered down
And this town's lost its faith
Our colors will fade eventually"
So, if our time is runnin' out
Day after day
We'll make the mundane our masterpiece

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh my, my
Oh my, my love
I take one look at you

[Chorus]
You're takin' me out of the ordinary
I want you layin' me down 'til we're dead and buried
On the edge of your knife, stayin' drunk on your vine
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found
Somethin' so out of the ordinary
You got me kissin' thе ground of your sanctuary
Shatter me with your touch, oh Lord, return mе to dust
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found

[Verse 2]
Hopeless hallelujah
On this side of Heaven's gate
Oh, my life, how do ya
Breathe and take my breath away?
At your altar, I will pray
You're the sculptor, I'm the clay

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh my, my

[Chorus]
You're takin' me out of the ordinary
I want you layin' me down 'til we're dead and buried
On the edge of your knife, stayin' drunk on your vine
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found
Somethin' so out (Out) of the ordinary (Ordinary)
You got me kissing the ground (Ground) of your sanctuary (Sanctuary)
Shatter me with your touch, oh Lord, return me to dust
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found

[Bridge]
Somethin' so heavenly, higher than ecstasy
Whenever you're next to me, oh my, my
World was in black and white until I saw your light
I thought you had to die to find

[Chorus]
Somethin' so out of the ordinary
I want you laying me down 'til we're dead and buried
On the edge of your knife, stayin' drunk on your vine
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found
Somethin' so out (Out) of the ordinary
You got me kissing the ground (Ground) of your sanctuary (Sanctuary)
Shatter me with your touch, oh Lord, return me to dust
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found

×=×=×=×=×

snippet.title: GTA V MILITARY CONVOY & FIGHTER JETS #part1
snippet.description:
This video features 100% original Grand Theft Auto V gameplay recorded and played by me in real time. All gameplay footage is captured directly from my own system and is not reused, copied, or taken from any other creator or source.
In this video, you will see authentic GTA 5 gameplay with natural progression, original playstyle, and proper in-game actions. Every scene, movement, and mission is performed by me during live gameplay recording. No third-party clips, movies, trailers, or reused content are included.
This content is created purely for gaming and entertainment purposes. The gameplay includes my own effort, recording, and basic editing to ensure originality and quality. Each video on this channel is uniquely recorded to provide viewers with a real and genuine GTA 5 experience.
Game Information
Game Name: Grand Theft Auto V
Platform: PC
Mode: Story Mode / Free Roam
Recording Type: Self Recorded Gameplay
If you enjoy original GTA 5 gameplay videos, feel free to support the channel by watching, liking, and subscribing for more upcoming content.
Thank you for watching.

snippet.title: [NP] PUBG MOBILE CAMPUS CLUB NEPAL 2026 – GRAND FINALS DAY 2
snippet.description:
Namaste Nepal! Witness the rise of the next generation of Nepali esports talent! Today marks the start of the PUBG MOBILE Campus Club Nepal 2026 Grand Finals.

Supported by Ncell, eSewa, and AECC, this tournament has brought together student gamers from 64 campuses across 5 cities. Today, the Top 16 teams face off in high-stakes matches to claim their share of the NPR 350,000 prize pool and qualify for the PMNC Nepal 2026 Round of 64.

Today's Schedule:

Match 1: Rondo
Match 2: Erangel
Match 3: Erangel
Match 4: Erangel
Match 5: Miramar
Match 6: Miramar

Don't miss a second of the action. Drop a comment for your favorite college team! 👇

#PMCC2026 #PUBGMNP #PUBGMobileCampusClub #CampusToConqueror

Lyrics:
Sun, sun re piya
Ghum hai kahan, kahan tu?
Khaarijh ye dil
Tune kiya, kiya kyu?
Khabar nahi teri na aasraa
Guroor hai tera ya hai khataa meri
Mujhe bata de zara

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
Sun saawariya

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

(Hmm)
(Aaa)

Taare, sitaare saare
Maange hai tera pataa
Aur aadhe, adhoore vaade
Leke chal diye ho kahan?

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
(Hmm)

Sun saawariya kahan tu?

Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoom

Sun saawariya

Teri preet ka charkha liye bas

snippet.title: Noob To Max With Only FRUIT BOXES In Blox Fruits
snippet.description:
In this video I bring a level one noob account all the way to a max level pro account, but I'm only allowed to use fruits that I get from fruit boxes. You can get fruit boxes from codes attached to Blox Fruits plushies. This video was very expensive, so please make sure to like the video and subscribe.

#bloxfruits #roblox #noobtopro
Join the group! https://www.roblox.com/groups/34051758/Meteorics-Galaxy#!/about
Join the discord! https://discord.gg/3QbWEBjseh

hi.title: ब्लॉक्स फ्रूट्स में सिर्फ फ्रूट बॉक्स का इस्तेमाल करके नौसिखिया से मैक्स तक पहुंचें
hi.description:
इस वीडियो में मैं एक लेवल वन के नौसिखिया अकाउंट को मैक्स लेवल प्रो अकाउंट तक ले जाता हूँ, लेकिन मुझे सिर्फ़ फ्रूट बॉक्स से मिलने वाले फ्रूट्स ही इस्तेमाल करने की इजाज़त है। आप Blox Fruits प्लशीज़ के साथ दिए गए कोड्स से फ्रूट बॉक्स पा सकते हैं। इस वीडियो को बनाने में काफ़ी खर्चा आया है, इसलिए वीडियो को लाइक और सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

#bloxfruits #roblox #noobtopro
ग्रुप जॉइन करें! https://www.roblox.com/groups/34051758/Meteorics-Galaxy#!/about
डिस्कॉर्ड जॉइन करें! https://discord.gg/3QbWEBjseh

pt-BR.title: De iniciante a mestre usando apenas caixas de frutas no Blox Fruits
pt-BR.description:
Neste vídeo, eu levo uma conta iniciante de nível 1 até o nível máximo de uma conta profissional, mas só posso usar as frutas que consigo nas caixas de frutas. Você pode conseguir caixas de frutas com os códigos anexados aos bichinhos de pelúcia do Blox Fruits. Este vídeo foi bem caro, então não se esqueça de curtir e se inscrever no canal.

#bloxfruits #roblox #noobtopro
Entre no grupo! https://www.roblox.com/groups/34051758/Meteorics-Galaxy#!/about
Entre no Discord! https://discord.gg/3QbWEBjseh

🚨 വമ്പൻ ക്യാഷ് ഗിവ് അവേ! ഗ്യാൻ ഗെയിമിംഗും റൈസ്റ്റാർ സർപ്രൈസ് സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബേഴ്‌സും! 🎁
ഈ വർഷത്തെ ഏറ്റവും വലിയ ഗിവ് അവേ ഇവന്റ്! ഭാഗ്യശാലികളായ സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബേഴ്‌സിന് 20 ലക്ഷം രൂപയുടെ വമ്പൻ സമ്മാനം നൽകി ഗ്യാൻ ഗെയിമിംഗും റൈസ്റ്റാറും അത്ഭുതകരമായ സമൂഹത്തിന് തിരിച്ചുനൽകി! 😱💸

എന്തുകൊണ്ടാണ് ഇത് സംഭവിക്കുന്നത്? കാരണം ഇത് ഔദ്യോഗികമായി MOBA 5v5 ഗോൾഡൻ മാസമാണ്, ആഘോഷങ്ങൾ ചാർട്ടുകളിൽ നിന്ന് പുറത്താണ്!

🎮 കളിച്ച് വലിയ സമ്മാനങ്ങൾ നേടൂ!

ക്യാഷ് ഗിവ് അവേയിൽ റിവാർഡുകൾ അവസാനിക്കുന്നില്ല. ഗോൾഡൻ മാസം ആഘോഷിക്കാൻ, ഇപ്പോൾ ഒരു ഭ്രാന്തൻ ഇൻ-ഗെയിം ഇവന്റ് നടക്കുന്നുണ്ട്:

10,000 സ്മാർട്ട്‌ഫോണുകൾ MOBA ഗെയിമിനുള്ളിൽ നേരിട്ട് നൽകുന്നു! 📱🔥

📲 ഇപ്പോൾ MOBA 5v5 ഡൗൺലോഡ് ചെയ്യുക:
വലിയ വിജയം നേടാനുള്ള നിങ്ങളുടെ അവസരം നഷ്ടപ്പെടുത്തരുത്. പ്ലേ സ്റ്റോറിലേക്ക് പോകുക, MOBA 5v5 ഡൗൺലോഡ് ചെയ്യുക, ഇന്ന് തന്നെ പ്രവർത്തനത്തിലേക്ക് കടക്കുക!
👉 https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mobiin.gp&pcampaignid=web_share

ഗ്യാൻ ഗെയിമിംഗിൽ നിന്നും റൈസ്റ്റാറിൽ നിന്നും നിങ്ങളുടെ റിവാർഡുകൾ എങ്ങനെ ക്ലെയിം ചെയ്യാമെന്ന് അറിയാൻ മുഴുവൻ വീഡിയോയും കാണുന്നത് ഉറപ്പാക്കുക.

👍 ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്യാനും സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യാനും ബെൽ ഐക്കൺ അമർത്താനും മറക്കരുത്, അങ്ങനെ നിങ്ങൾക്ക് ഒരു അപ്‌ഡേറ്റും നഷ്ടമാകില്ല! നിങ്ങൾ വിജയിച്ചാൽ നിങ്ങൾ എന്തുചെയ്യുമെന്ന് അഭിപ്രായങ്ങളിൽ ഞങ്ങളെ അറിയിക്കുക!

snippet.title: Billie Eilish - BIRDS OF A FEATHER (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🍃 Billie Eilish - BIRDS OF A FEATHER (Lyrics)
🌎Download / Stream: https://open.spotify.com/track/6dOtVTDdiauQNBQEDOtlAB 
💚Help us reach 50.000 subscribers!💚

🌸Billie Eilish
https://www.facebook.com/billieeilish
https://x.com/billieeilish

💚 Lyrics:  Billie Eilish - BIRDS OF A FEATHER
[Verse 1]
I want you to stay
'Til I'm in the grave
'Til I rot away, dead and buried
'Til I'm in the casket you carry
If you go, I'm goin' too, uh
'Cause it was always you (Alright)
And if I'm turnin' blue, please don't save me
Nothin' left to lose without my baby

[Refrain]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone
Can't change the weather, might not be forever
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
It might not be long, but baby, I

[Chorus]
I'll love you 'til the day that I die
'Til the day that I die
'Til the light leaves my eyes
'Til the day that I die
See Billie Eilish Live
Get tickets as low as $225

You might also like
Houdini
Eminem
True Blue (Demo)
Billie Eilish
She Knows
J. Cole

[Verse 2]
I want you to see, hm
How you look to me, hm
You wouldn't believe if I told ya
You would keep the compliments I throw ya
But you're so full of shit, uh
Tell me it's a bit, oh
Say you don't see it, your mind's polluted
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
It might not be long, but baby, I
Don't wanna say goodbye

[Chorus]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know ('Til the day that I die)
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone ('Til the light leaves my eyes)
Can't change the weather, might not be forever ('Til the day that I die)
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Post-Chorus]
I knew you in another life
You had that same look in your eyes
I love you, don't act so surprised

snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and he’s counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent’s Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

#clashofclans
